title: Multi-Select Drop Down Label Translated to Multiple Rows in Table on a Workdoc Template?
excerpt: I have a dropdown that I allow multiple labels to be selected. I want to create a template for a workdoc where the workdoc will have a table that lists each label as its own row. Can I do that somehow?

posts.author: BTindall (Berkys)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a dropdown that I allow multiple labels to be selected. I want to create a template for a workdoc where the workdoc will have a table that lists each label as its own row. Can I do that somehow?
